text.title: Brand Voice Consistency System Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Brand Voice Consistency System end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: extract-attributes
step.action: Identify recurring tone signals; pick 5 attributes.

step.name: draft-do-dont
step.action: For each attribute, write 2 do/don't pairs with example sentences.

step.name: channel-adaptation
step.action: Define length / emoji / formality / link density per channel.

step.name: drift-audit-baseline
step.action: Score sample against doc; record baseline drift score.
